actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Find an active extension card with selector `.active-extension-card`
actions.description: Verify that an active extension card is visible on the page

actions.instruction: Click the toggle switch label inside that active extension card
actions.description: Click the toggle switch label within the active extension card
Click the confirm/primary button in the visible modal dialog

actions.instruction: Observe the action tag changes to "Deactivating..." with a shimmer animation
actions.description: Take a screenshot to observe the action tag changes to 'Deactivating...' with a shimmer animation

actions.instruction: Wait for the success toast "Extension deactivated successfully"
actions.description: Wait for success toast indicating the extension has been deactivated.

actions.instruction: Verify the checkbox inside the active extension card is now unchecked
actions.description: Verify the toggle is unchecked for the active extension card
